creator: john.c.prather@gmail.com
text:
I approve, thank you!

On Fri, 13 Jan 2012 23:10:16 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/davmail,
>
> Please note that PR ports/164105 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/164105
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Sent from my mobile device
